title: Golden Apple Seeds
description:
This pack was made to make golden apples look like seeds but golden. As seen in some of Theobladthebird's
Youtube videos.
body:
# Description
**Golden Apple Seeds** is a simple and lightweight resource pack that changes the appearance of both the Golden Apple and the Enchanted Golden Apple.

**Instead of the default look, they now appear as gold-colored seeds**.
This pack only replaces two textures and is fully compatible with all gameplay‑affecting mods and datapacks.

## Features
- Replaces Golden Apple with a gold‑seed texture
- Replaces Enchanted Golden Apple with a golden seed with enchantment glow
- Works on all versions from 1.20.4 to 1.21.11
  
# Important
To ensure the textures display correctly, **place this resource pack at the very top of your resource‑pack list** in Minecraft.![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea3fe5f6fc046b4896a7a46c4da1ec88cd9c7a0e.png)
